name: Dwerg
author: Poki
description: Dwerg is a charming simulation game where you play as a clever dwarf trying to fix your crashed rocket!️ Chop trees, mine gems, and craft tools to process materials. Gather resources and explore the area for everything you need. You might even find some cute helpers to join your journey. Can you repair your rocket and continue your adventure? How to play Dwerg Use WASD, the arrow keys, or the joystick to move. Who created Dwerg Dwerg is created by kokos.games. Play their other games on Poki: Joyrider and Supernova ! How can I play Dwerg for free? You can play Dwerg for free on Poki. Can I play Dwerg on mobile devices and desktop? Dwerg can be played on your computer and mobile devices like phones and tablets.
